title: Login service returning 500 errors
description: Users unable to log in. Authentication endpoint returning HTTP 500. Error logs show NullPointerException in TokenValidator.java at line 142. Affects ~2300 users.

title: Payment processing timeout
description: Checkout flow hanging indefinitely. Payment gateway calls timing out after 30s. Stripe webhook receiver not responding. Revenue impact ~$45k/hr.

title: Search returning stale results
description: Product search showing items from 3 days ago. Elasticsearch index not refreshing. Cache invalidation appears broken.

title: API rate limiting too aggressive
description: Legitimate API clients getting 429 errors at 10% of normal rate limit. OAuth token bucket logic appears misconfigured.

title: Database connection pool exhausted
description: Application throwing 'No connections available' errors intermittently. Pool size not scaling under load. Affects all write operations.

title: Mobile app crash on startup
description: iOS app crashing immediately on launch after v2.4.1 push. Crash report: EXC_BAD_ACCESS in UserSessionManager. Android unaffected.

title: Dashboard charts not loading
description: Main analytics dashboard showing blank charts. Console errors: TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined. Affects all Pro tier customers.

title: Email notifications not sending
description: Password reset and transactional emails not being delivered. Queue depth growing. SES bounce rate spiked to 87%.
